mainText: At least six people died after tornadoes swept across Michigan and Oklahoma, according to officials.

titleText: JTF News: Deutsche Welle, BBC News
mainText: A Russian strike on an apartment block in Kharkiv killed seven people.

mainText: Indonesia's government announced a plan to ban social media access for users under 16 years old.

titleText: JTF News: CBC News, ABC News Australia
mainText: Oil prices reached $90 USD per barrel for the first time in 2 years.
President Trump stated that Governor Kristi Noem will be replaced as Secretary of Homeland Security.
